headline: Ecolab Nears Deal for KKR’s Data-Center Cooling Company
summary: Ecolab  is nearing a deal to acquire data-center cooling company CoolIT Systems from  KKR  for between $4.5 billion and $5 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.  The price tag is a staggering jump from the company’s roughly $270 million valuation when KKR acquired a majority stake in 2023.  CoolIT makes liquid-cooling systems that are used in data centers.

headline: GPZ: Why Private Credit Under Pressure Has Nothing To Do With 2008 Crisis
summary: GPZ currently trades at 14x forward earnings versus a historical average of 19x, implying a 35% upside if multiples revert. Find out why GPZ ETF is a buy.

headline: Assessing KKR (NYSE:KKR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Recent share performance and what it might signal KKR (KKR) shares have seen mixed returns recently, with a 1 day gain of 1.9% and a 7 day rise of 4.0%, set against a month decline of 10.9% and a past 3 months decline of 31.3%. See our latest analysis for KKR. Even after the recent bounce, KKR’s share price return over the past year remains negative while the 3 year and 5 year total shareholder returns are strongly positive. This suggests long term holders have still seen substantial gains...
